title: lunathyrium × kiyozumianum
intro: Lunathyrium × kiyozumianum is a sterile interspecific hybrid plant, specifically a cross between Lunathyrium japonicum and Athyrium yokoscense, belonging to the family Athyriaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the circulation of blood and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Lunathyrium × kiyozumianum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and night sweats, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and promote relaxation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
